description: FastTree fast approximate maximum-likelihood tree for large datasets (aligned FASTA -> Newick tree).
rules: read-only on inputs; writes one artifact (phylo.tree) under record_store
nucleotide alignments use -nt -gtr -gamma; protein alignments use -lg -gamma
requires the FastTree binary on PATH; without it the porter degrades gracefully and emits {}
usage: Set ALIGNED_FASTA (an alignment). Optional SEQ_TYPE (nt|aa, default nt). Output: phylo.tree.
limitation: Needs FastTree installed (conda install -c bioconda fasttree). Offline / without FastTree the tree is not produced; the output is a graceful {} placeholder. Approximate ML — less accurate than IQ-TREE but 10-100x faster on >5000 sequences.
